series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained on Council members relating to their appointment and tenure on the Council. Records may include: Correspondence, meeting notes, billings, receipts, travel and per diem reports, training notes and all other records within the agency’s possession relating to specific members and appointment documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain three (3) state fiscal years from the end of service, or until transferred to Machine Readable format then destroy. A Certificate of Disposal is only required for records that have not been converted and maintained in Machine Readable format. ; Electronic: Retain three (3) state fiscal years from the end of service. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
